assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); data.status === 'requires_user_selection' && data.ask_user_question && data.ask_user_question.header === 'Skill Gaps' && data.ask_user_question.multiSelect === true && Array.isArray(data.ask_user_question.options) && data.ask_user_question.options.length >= 1 && data.rewrite_started === false
